title: GenAI Gateway: Bulk Inference Exfiltration / Model Extraction (AML.T0024)
description: Surfaces callers driving high inference volume and token throughput against the GenAI gateway, the signature of model-extraction and data exfiltration via the inference API. Aggregates calls, summed tokens, and distinct models touched per API key / identity / source IP. Triage threshold: investigate callers with token throughput far above their baseline. MITRE ATLAS AML.T0024 (Exfiltration via ML Inference API).
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC GenAI Gateway Logs' and ('GenAI Operation' = 'chat.completions' or 'GenAI Operation' = 'completions' or 'GenAI Operation' = 'embeddings') | stats count as Calls, sum('GenAI Total Tokens') as Tokens, distinctcount('GenAI Model') as Models by 'API Key ID', 'GenAI Identity', 'Client IP' | sort -Tokens
falsepositives: High-volume legitimate RAG or chatbot integrations with a known baseline
